name: City Park Cyr Gates Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at City Park Cyr Gates Community Center in New Iberia, LA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Willow Wood Park
description: Come play pickleball at Willow Wood Park in New Iberia, LA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
